ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Class of the asset (e.g., Stock, Bond, Commodity) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry of the security */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol used to identify the security */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security */,
  "last_price" TEXT /* Last traded price of the security */,
  "opening_price" TEXT /* Price at the opening of the market */,
  "max_price" TEXT /* Maximum price during the trading session */,
  "min_price" TEXT /* Minimum price during the trading session */,
  "closing_price" TEXT /* Price at the end of the trading session */,
  "price_change" TEXT /* Percentage change in price */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Volume of securities traded */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Total number of shares traded */,
  "high_52_week" TEXT /* 52-week high price */,
  "low_52_week" TEXT /* 52-week low price */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded closing price */,
  "closing_price" TEXT /* Recorded closing price on that date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price on that date */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of securities traded on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Specific resource accessed by the user */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security for which the alert is set */,
  "threshold_price" TEXT /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the investment strategy */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the investment strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment strategy */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "return" REAL /* Return percentage of the strategy */,
  "risk" REAL /* Risk level associated with the strategy */,
  "benchmark_return" REAL /* Return of a benchmark (e.g., S&P 500) for comparison purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES investment_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Starting date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Ending date of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the index's value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate record */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the exchange rate */,
  "currency_pair" TEXT /* Currency pair represented (e.g., USD/EUR) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate for the currency pair */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rate was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)
